All 11 acceptance criteria are satisfied by commit 55f7ced8 (this bead's
prior attempt) and the closed dependency chain:

AC-1: terminal-bench/terminal-bench-2-1 recorded as the dataset in
      scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml (line 18) and
      both tb21-canary and tb21-full subset files.

AC-2: fizeau-85d36567 (closed) implemented sweep.go phase runner and
      local Qwen provider profiles (bragi-club-3090, sindri-club-3090,
      grendel-rapid-mlx).

AC-3: Dep beads fizeau-dcb621f8 (canary docs) and fizeau-66c928b3
      (README workflow) are both closed.

AC-4: TB-2.0 fixture scripts/benchmark/task-subset-v2.yaml retains its
      terminal-bench@2.0 label; no 2.0 evidence/subset files were relabeled.

AC-5: task-subset-v2.yaml has explicit TB-2.0-ONLY banner (lines 4-9)
      directing operators to use tb21 subsets for 2.1 work (55f7ced8).

AC-6: cmd/bench sweep command supports phases: canary, local-qwen,
      sonnet-comparison, gpt-comparison, and all (sweep.go line 154).

AC-7: resume=true is the default (sweep.go line 158); resource groups
      have max_concurrency=1 for local endpoints (terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml).

AC-8: egress_canary.sh has warn_dataset_mismatch() runtime guard added
      in 55f7ced8; warns when DATASET != terminal-bench@2.0 because the
      script validates a local TB-2.0 task directory.

AC-9: bash -n passes for all changed benchmark shell scripts.

AC-10: go test ./cmd/bench passes.

AC-11: fizeau-c770193a (full sweep bead) already lists fizeau-ee77ec7f
       as a dependency.
